# Estate Planning

```{r}
#| label: setup-r
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
source("_common.R")
```

```{python}
#| label: setup-py
#| include: false
```

<br>


You don't need a complicated trust to do the basics right. A will, named
beneficiaries on every account, and a power of attorney cover most people.

  - Will and (sometimes) trust
  - Beneficiary designations override your will; keep them current
  - Power of attorney and healthcare directives
  - Where to keep the paperwork so it can actually be found
